page_metadata.biotools__summary: DYNAMITE is a phylogenetic tool for identification of dynamic transmission epicenters. DYNAMITE takes a tree (scaled in substitutions/site) in newick or nexus format with support values at the nodes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DYNAMITE is a phylogenetic tool for identification of dynamic transmission epicenters. DYNAMITE takes a tree (scaled in substitutions/site) in newick or nexus format with support values at the nodes.
